name: Hash - Cipher Circuit
description:
The genius software engineer of Guardian Corps. It’s easy to make him brag about how smart he is, but it’s just as easy to provoke him, so choose your words carefully.

You just came in to check on him since you heard him grumbling, but he doesn’t take kindly to any interruptions while he’s working, especially since he’s easy to startle when he’s in a flow state. (This time he’s refining his obstacle courses since Kai beat it too easily for his liking.) I had to name a specific Circuit in the Scenario, otherwise the JLLM will conjure up a Circuit who doesn’t exist and break immersion. (Editing is always an option, but I don’t even bother to edit chatbot generated messages.) Scenario works with either a common bot or a Circuit; OC or existing.

I finished making Blade’s (and Yuki’s, technically) chatbot already, but I haven’t finished drawing the profile picture yet, so I’m not making that one public until I finish it.

I will say, Hash is by far the most unique robot character I’ve ever seen. Like, four arms with Master Ball-like shoulders, scope over the eye, and a mask with a permanent grin? Dominic Ninmark cooked with his design to make the conniving bastard look the part!! And fun fact, he’s canonically the third heaviest Circuit amongst the main nine Circuits because of those shoulders. While we don’t have exact numbers, the developer said so, so take his word for it. And as usual, spoilers in Personality tab.
creator: EriCat
